name: Shrimp and Scallops, Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and sauté until it begins to brown. Remove the garlic with a slotted spoon and set aside.
3. Add the red pepper flakes to the skillet and increase the heat to medium-high.
4. Add the garlic (still hot), shrimp, scallops, and paprika. Sauté for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Add the chicken broth and cook for 1 minute. Remove the shrimp and scallops with a slotted spoon and place on a platter; set aside and keep warm.
6. Add the lime juice and parsley. Just warm through.
7. Pour the sauce over the shrimp and scallops and serve immediately.
